$comment: PG-126 public product tour configuration. Validated by onboardingConfigSchema in packages/validators/src/public-onboarding.ts.

steps.title: Welcome to IntelliFlow
steps.description: Let's walk through the four capabilities that set IntelliFlow apart. Use Next or Enter to continue; Esc closes the tour.

steps.title: AI Lead Scoring
steps.description: Scores every inbound lead in real time using an ensemble of explainable models, so your team focuses on the highest-intent contacts first.

steps.title: Workflow Automation
steps.description: Build multi-step automations visually. Triggers, conditions, and AI agents run on the same durable workflow engine.

steps.title: Revenue Analytics
steps.description: Pipeline velocity, conversion cohorts, and NPS trends in one dashboard — ready to share with the rest of the team.
